_comment: Registration source of truth for `claude-relay init`. Mirrors the real ~/.claude/settings.json hook layout: settings['hooks'][<event>] is a list of entries, each {matcher?, hooks:[{type,command,timeout}]}. Relay hooks may live INSIDE a multi-hook entry alongside non-relay hooks (e.g. cost-discipline) — init detects by command-substring and never clobbers neighbours. `command` here is the hook basename; init resolves it to <HOME>/.claude/hooks/<basename>. matcher null means the entry carries no matcher key.
